description: Counts unhealthy Binance depth heartbeats without changing the full_live DEX-first runtime phase.
filter: resource.type="k8s_container" AND resource.labels.cluster_name="arb-bot" AND resource.labels.namespace_name="arb-bot" AND resource.labels.container_name="arb-bot" AND jsonPayload.fields.message="Binance depth health heartbeat" AND jsonPayload.fields.healthy=false
